canonical_answer: Men wearing traditional robes and turbans stand near a large green military tank on a city street. Several individuals hold rifles while one person in the foreground holds a rocket-propelled grenade launcher. Smoke rises from the ground near a beige truck parked in front of a multi-story building with flames visible inside the second-story windows.

question: Describe the visual progression of the Yemen segment, noting specific objects and actions at different timestamps.
canonical_answer: At 0s, smoke rises from multiple points within a dense urban environment; at 4s, several men carrying rifles gather around a large green military tank; at 8s, armed individuals stand in the back of a beige truck while fire burns inside a building window.

question: Describe the visual progression of the Supreme Court segment, noting specific objects and actions at different timestamps.
canonical_answer: At 12s, the exterior of a white neoclassical building is shown with an American flag; at 14s, several people walk on the paved area in front of the columns; at 18s, numerous small figures are visible on the wide steps leading up to the building.
